dup_key_definition: md5(basename(file or member)|column_name|frac_integer|min|max|n_integer) — content fingerprint, NOT path: GSOD station-years stay distinct unless sampled stats collide
representative_rule: lexicographically smallest (file_path, archive_member, sheet_or_table, column_name) per dup_key
notes: channel_kind + generating_process are metadata only; never fed to clustering/projection/distance/geometry
